task:
A pre-seeded Zotero library is at /home/user/Zotero/zotero.sqlite. Two companion bibliography files are provided: /home/user/Documents/bibliography.csv (human-readable source) and /home/user/Documents/bibliography.ris (the Zotero-importable conversion, 3 entries).

Create a new top-level collection named exactly 'Imported Bibliography' and import /home/user/Documents/bibliography.ris so that all imported items end up inside that collection. After completion, the 'Imported Bibliography' collection must exist and contain at least 3 items, and items titled 'Efficient Estimation of Word Representations' and 'GloVe' must exist in the library. Leave Zotero running.
